title: Senior SEO Specialist at Grofers Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Grofers Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
